content:
📜 4. Betrayal Mechanic – The Legendary Faction Defection Option

📜 Players can betray their faction and switch sides—but it comes at a cost.

✔ How Betrayal Works:
• A player must publicly declare their intent to betray.
• They must pass a skill check to be accepted by the new faction.
• Their old faction gets a “revenge opportunity” to challenge them before they leave.

✔ Cost of Betrayal:
• The betrayer must permanently give up a buff or ability.
• Their new faction only grants them 50% of their usual benefits at first.
• Their old faction gets a one-time opportunity to sabotage them.

✔ Legendary Betrayal Unlockable (Late Game):
• If a student reaches a high XP threshold, they can betray a faction AND form their own new faction.
• This creates a splinter group with custom mechanics.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 459 (chunk 459/555)
